def negative_module_import_starts_runtime_bootstrap():
    rule_id = "module_import_starts_runtime_bootstrap"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag imports that eagerly start threads, background loops, watchers, or connection attempts at import time."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
